series.curator_notes: Episodes 1-25 of the original Netflix series 'Trollhunters/Trolljäger' by Guillermo del Toro. Each album contains 2-3 TV episodes adapted as audio drama. Duplicate Folge 3 with bonus Dragons content excluded in favor of clean version. Mislabeled 'Folge 33' is a Dragons crossover compilation with duplicate Folge 1 content - excluded.

review.notes: No issues found. 25 TV episodes + 1 bonus Dragons content.

verification.concerns: Minor duplication note: Episode 20 appears twice in the included list (both entries are identical - "Folge 20: Nachtpatrouille / Verbrecherjagd in Arcadia" [2WbogpNt2OUeLkOMr5jNZY]). This appears to be a listing error where the episode was duplicated in the source data, not a critical issue since it's the same album.
